message:
feat(abi): nativize __towctrans, __wctrans_l, __wctype_l, __res_init, __res_query and more glibc internal symbols

Convert additional glibc internal symbols from dlsym_passthrough! to
native implementations that forward to our already-implemented ABI
functions:

- __towctrans → super::unistd_abi::towctrans
- __wctrans_l → super::wchar_abi::wctrans_l
- __wctype_l → super::wchar_abi::wctype_l
- __res_init → super::unistd_abi::res_init
- __res_query → super::unistd_abi::res_query

This continues the systematic elimination of glibc callthrough
dependencies by routing internal double-underscore variants to their
already-native public counterparts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
